input.tenant_message: The breaker for my master bedroom keeps tripping every few days. I reset it each time but it trips again within a day or two. I don't think I'm overloading it — it's just my TV and a lamp on that circuit. This has been going on for about three weeks.

ai_output.recommended_action: Schedule a licensed electrician to inspect the breaker and associated circuit. A breaker that trips repeatedly under light load often indicates a failing breaker, a loose neutral wire, or an underlying short circuit. Continuing to reset a faulty breaker without diagnosis can cause wiring damage or a fire risk over time.
